name: HARTE HANKS INC
summary: Harte Hanks, Inc. is a global Business Experience Outsourcing company operating at the intersection of data, marketing, sales, customer care, fulfillment, and logistics. It serves B2B and B2C clients across industries including technology, healthcare, consumer products, financial services, and automotive. Services include data analytics, demand generation, managed marketing services, inside sales outsourcing, customer care, and fulfillment and logistics, helping clients manage the full customer and product lifecycle.
